nasb.text: Moses did just as the Lord commanded him; and he took Joshua and set him before Eleazar the priest and before all the congregation.

esv.text: And Moses did as the Lord commanded him. He took Joshua and made him stand before Eleazar the priest and the whole congregation,

cnv.text: 於是，摩西照著耶和華吩咐他的去行；他把約書亞領來，叫他站在以利亞撒祭司和全體會眾面前，

ccb.text: 摩西遵命而行，把约书亚召来，让他站在以利亚撒祭司和全体会众面前，
